stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
How does the drag polar differ between wings with high and low aspect ratios?

options.a: The aspect ratio depends only on the airplane’s configuration.
options.b: The low-aspect ratio polar 1 will move down and to the right when the aspect ratio is increased.
options.c: A high aspect ratio wing will not influence the shift of the polar curve.
options.d: The low-aspect ratio polar 2 will move up and to the left when the aspect ratio is increased.
